_doc: PipelineContext -- accumulated state at Search Profile convergence. NeedSet phase and Brand Resolver phase run in parallel via Promise.all. This object represents everything available to Search Profile and all subsequent phases. NOTE: The authoritative runtime schema is now pipelineContextSchema.js (Zod, cumulative checkpoints). This JSON is a reference snapshot.
validated_against: 2026-03-23 (re-audited: discoveryResult fields corrected to match live code)

orchestrator_context._doc: Resolved by the orchestrator before and between phases. Not owned by any single phase.
orchestrator_context.discoveryConfig: object -- config with discoveryEnabled=true and searchEngines defaulted to 'bing,google'

planningHints.missingRequiredFields: string[] -- normalized from roundContext or requiredFields
planningHints.missingCriticalFields: string[] -- normalized from roundContext or categoryConfig.schema.critical_fields

orchestrator_context.queryExecutionHistory: { queries: Array<object> } -- from frontierDb.buildQueryExecutionHistory(productId), built before phases start

resolvedIdentity._doc: Built from resolveJobIdentity(job) after NeedSet+Brand Resolver complete.

orchestrator_context.missingFields: string[] -- deduplicated union of missingRequiredFields + missingCriticalFields + job.requirements.focus_fields + llmTargetFields

learning._doc: Loaded from storage after NeedSet+Brand Resolver complete.

orchestrator_context.enrichedLexicon: object -- built from learning.lexicon (JSON learning artifacts)
orchestrator_context.searchProfileCaps: object -- from resolveSearchProfileCaps() (no config param, returns hardcoded defaults)
orchestrator_context.categoryConfig: object -- MUTATED by orchestrator after Brand Resolver: brand promotions applied to sourceHosts, sourceHostMap, approvedRootDomains, sourceRegistry

from_needset_phase._doc: Returned by runNeedSet(). See 01-needset-contract.json for full shapes.
from_needset_phase.focusGroups: FocusGroup[] -- from search planning context focus_groups. Carries group_search_worthy, normalized_key_queue, productivity_score, group_description_long per group.
from_needset_phase.seedStatus: SeedStatus | null -- from search planning context seed_status. Contains specs_seed and source_seeds with is_needed flags.
from_needset_phase.seedSearchPlan: SearchPlan | null -- full search plan output from assembleSearchPlan(). Attached to discoveryResult at end of pipeline for finalization reuse.

from_brand_resolver_phase._doc: Returned by runBrandResolver(). See 02-brand-resolver-contract.json for full shapes.
from_brand_resolver_phase._note: Orchestrator applies brand promotion inline — checks brandResolution.officialDomain and adds to categoryConfig.sourceHosts/sourceHostMap/approvedRootDomains directly. The phase does NOT return promotions. Brand Resolver is the SOLE source of manufacturer domain data — no static manufacturer lists exist.

search_profile._doc: CONVERGENCE POINT. First phase that requires output from both NeedSet (focusGroups, seedStatus) and Brand Resolver (brandResolution). Fully deterministic, no LLM.
search_profile.searchProfileBase: object -- deterministic query profile with tier-tagged query_rows, base_templates, variant_guard_terms, coverage_analysis, etc.

search_planner._doc: LLM-enhanced query rows. Tier metadata (tier, hint_source, group_key, normalized_key, target_fields) passes through unchanged.
search_planner.enhancedRows: Array<object> -- same shape as searchProfileBase.query_rows, with potentially LLM-rewritten query strings

query_journey._doc: Final selected query list after dedupe, rank, guard, cap.
query_journey.queries: string[] -- final query strings for execution
query_journey.profileQueryRowsByQuery: Map<string, object> -- original profile rows by lowercase query

search_execution._doc: Internal-first lookup, frontier reuse, live provider search, plan-only fallback. queryConcurrency forced to 1.
search_execution.internalSatisfied: boolean -- true when internal sources met required-field pressure
search_execution.externalSearchReason: string | null -- why external search was needed

result_processing._doc: Result Processing — selector path or deterministic lane-selection path. Rewrites search_profile to status: 'executed'.

discoveryResult.candidates: Array<object> -- triage-annotated candidate rows (approved + not-selected + overflow)
discoveryResult.selectedUrls: string[] -- URLs selected by SERP selector LLM
discoveryResult.llm_queries: string[] -- empty array from canonical callers
discoveryResult.serp_explorer: object -- SERP explorer summary with per-query stats
discoveryResult._note: Orchestrator attaches seed_search_plan_output and enqueue_summary via fresh merge after Domain Classifier.

domain_classifier._doc: Enqueues approved URLs to planner queue, seeds candidate URLs. Returns summary attached to discoveryResult.enqueue_summary.

enqueue_summary.seededCount: number -- candidate URLs seeded (when fetchCandidateSources enabled)

between_brand_resolver_and_search_profil: Apply brand promotions to categoryConfig (sourceHosts, sourceHostMap, approvedRootDomains, sourceRegistry)
resolveSearchProfileCaps() -> searchProfileCaps (hardcoded defaults, no config param)
between_query_journey_and_search_executi: Emit search_queued events for all planned queries (GUI slot pre-allocation)
after_domain_classifier: Build finalResult as fresh merge: { ...discoveryResult, seed_search_plan_output, enqueue_summary }
